import subprocess

def convert_images(image_paths):
    cmd = ["mogrify", "-format", "webp"] + image_paths
    subprocess.run(cmd, check=True)
    return [p.replace(".png", ".webp") for p in image_paths]

def check_hosts(hostnames):
    hosts_str = " ".join(hostnames)
    result = subprocess.run(
        ["fping", "-q"] + hostnames,
        capture_output=True, text=True,
    )
    reachable = set(result.stdout.strip().splitlines())
    return {h: h in reachable for h in hostnames}
